headline: Top Stock Reports for Oracle, T-Mobile & Gilead
summary: Oracle's cloud infrastructure revenue jumped 84% in fiscal Q3 as AI and multicloud demand surged, though heavy data-center investments pushed trailing free cash flow to -$13.2B.

raw.headline: Top Stock Reports for Oracle, T-Mobile & Gilead
raw.summary: Oracle's cloud infrastructure revenue jumped 84% in fiscal Q3 as AI and multicloud demand surged, though heavy data-center investments pushed trailing free cash flow to -$13.2B.

headline: Pharma Leaders Discuss Managing Revenue Management System Updates at Model N Rainmaker Panel Hosted by RevSavvy
summary: RevSavvy, a revenue management startup working with pharmaceutical and life science companies, is increasingly recognized as an emerging leader in the category through its AI-powered platform, ARC by RevSavvy, and specialized consulting services. The company recently hosted a panel discussion at the Model N Rainmaker Conference featuring leaders from Gilead Sciences, Astellas Pharmaceuticals, and Ascendis Pharma to discuss the evolving challenges of revenue management releases in the cloud.

headline: Why Investors Aren’t Fleeing to Safe-Haven Stocks
summary: When investors fret over geopolitical shocks, they usually rotate into safe havens such as consumer staples and healthcare.  Less obviously, tech and software stocks have also advanced, while traditional safety plays such as healthcare and packaged food have sold off.  By the time hostilities began, those defensive sectors were already crowded—and no longer quite as cheap.

headline: European stocks finish lower as oil prices jump despite reserve release
summary: European stocks ended Thursday's session lower as investors monitor the Iran war and global oil prices.
